name: ai-zippy/cotop-sourcing
title: CO-TOP Sourcing
description: CO-TOP sourcing and import advantage section.

default.title: Direct Brand Partnerships
default.body: We are authorised distributors for Hanex, Hanstone, Cresto, and Mica — giving us direct access to full product ranges, competitive pricing, and technical support.

default.title: Consistent Stock Availability
default.body: Our strong import pipeline ensures popular colours and materials are consistently available, reducing lead times for your project.

default.title: Quality Assured Materials
default.body: Every material meets international quality standards, with full product warranties backed directly by the original manufacturers.

default.title: Wide Selection
default.body: From classic whites and marbles to bold industrial tones — our curated palette spans hundreds of colours across all three material categories.
